name: Defense Of Fort Burton
short_description: Master legendary heroes in intense top-down combat while commanding strategic tower defenses. Control your champion directly, build and upgrade persistent towers that provide covering fire, then face powerful bosses and massive hordes. Use magic to empower your strategy and turn the tide of battle.
detailed_description:
Defense of Fort Burton is a top-down action RPG that fuses intense hero combat with strategic tower defense. Rebuild a besieged fortress, master legendary heroes, and face waves of corrupted creatures in heroic battles for survival.

This is a single player gameplay with blend of action and strategy. Defeat the series of various enemies, each enemies bring different character and ways to defeat them. Fight against unique bosses through at the climax situation.

Command Heroes

Take direct control of a single hero in battle. Choose your champion from a roster of legendary defenders, each offering a completely unique combat experience:

Howard - Frontline tank who holds the line with devastating ground-based abilities and crowd control. Built for players who love aggressive, in-your-face combat.

Lexy - Swift ranged expert with precision strikes and tactical mobility. Master hit-and-run tactics and eliminate priority targets before they reach your walls.

Albert - Arcane powerhouse wielding massive area-of-effect spells and battlefield control. Dominate through strategic positioning and devastating magical combos.

Build Your Fortress, Plan Your Defense

Between battles, invest in your fortress. Place and upgrade towers across 5 distinct battle areas—Town, Forest, Cave, Mountain, and River Gate. Each tower you build is a permanent investment that grows stronger with every upgrade. Assign specialized fighters to your towers, configure powerful modifiers, and create defensive strategies that persist across all battles in that area.

Your pre-battle decisions aren't just preparation they're long-term strategic commitments. A well-fortified Town carries you through multiple sieges. Neglect your Cave defenses, and enemies will exploit that weakness.

Heroic Combat Meets Tower Defense Strategy

Take direct control of your hero with precise mouse commands while your towers and fighters provide automated fire support. Cast powerful active abilities, position yourself strategically, and make split-second tactical decisions as enemy waves crash against your defenses.

Support your heroic battle with powerful spells. Collect magic points from fallen enemies to cast game-changing magi summon defensive barricades, unleash meteor storms, buff your entire army, or create devastating aura effects. Every battle is a dance between hero skill, strategic tower placement, and tactical spell usage.

Progression That Matters

Every victory rewards you with Gold, Materials, and Artifacts—currencies that fuel your fortress growth. Upgrade hero abilities through the Character Tree, craft and enhance equipment at the Blacksmith, unlock devastating spells at the Mage Guild, and expand your tactical options through multiple progression systems.

Upgrades are deliberately meaningful. When you increase your hero's attack speed or unlock a new ability, you **feel** the difference immediately. No invisible stat inflation—just tangible power growth that changes how you play.

Endless Replayability

Lure System (Quick Play): Jump into repeatable battles for 15-30 minute grinding sessions. Earn resources, level heroes, and strengthen defenses without story pressure. The system automatically targets your weakest areas, encouraging balanced fortress development.

Library Challenges: Unlock special challenge levels with unique difficulty modifiers and gameplay twists. Test your mastery, unlock unique rewards, and discover Fort Burton's hidden history through these distinctive trials.

Join Us on Discord

Join our discord and experience our journey in development of the game.

Early Access Note

This game is being rework and the current game content is only 10% currently for version 0.1. Constantly updated every week and add more content. Wishlist to follow our journey. Thank you
